channel.title: Adam Silva Consulting Insights
channel.description: Global Infrastructure for Agentic Commerce. Strategic intelligence, market analysis, and frameworks for navigating the AI transformation era.

item.title: The Agentic Commerce Protocols: UCP, ACP, and AP2
item.description: Complete technical guide to the three foundational protocols powering AI-mediated commerce: Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP), Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP), and Agent Payments Protocol (AP2).
item.author: info@adamsilvaconsulting.com (Adam Silva)

item.title: The AI Authority Imperative: Gartner's 50% Traffic Decline Prediction
item.description: Gartner's projection of 50% organic traffic decline marks the definitive end of click-based optimization. Strategic analysis of what this means for business visibility.
item.author: info@adamsilvaconsulting.com (Adam Silva)

item.title: Zero-Click Searches: The New Reality of Information Discovery
item.description: How 65% of searches now result in zero clicks and what it means for business visibility in the AI era.
item.author: info@adamsilvaconsulting.com (Adam Silva)

item.title: The Integrated Service Ecosystem: Strategic Flywheel Analysis
item.description: How interconnected services create compound authority growth and competitive advantages in the modern digital landscape.
item.author: info@adamsilvaconsulting.com (Adam Silva)

item.title: E-E-A-T Evolution: Building Authority in the Generative AI Era
item.description: How Google's E-E-A-T framework has evolved for AI evaluation and authority assessment in the generative AI era.
item.author: info@adamsilvaconsulting.com (Adam Silva)
